message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor<<User>> #EAEAEA
  BorderColor<<User>> black
}
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor<<RegistrationRepository>> #EAEAEA
  BorderColor<<RegistrationRepository>> black
}
skinparam circle {
  BackgroundColor<<RegistrationService>> #EAEAEA
  BorderColor<<RegistrationService>> black
}

actor "User" as User <<User>>
circle "RegistrationService" as RegistrationService <<RegistrationService>>
component "RegistrationRepository" as RegistrationRepository <<RegistrationRepository>>

User -> RegistrationService : createUser(name, pass)
activate RegistrationService
RegistrationService -> RegistrationRepository : save(User)
activate RegistrationRepository
deactivate RegistrationRepository
RegistrationRepository --> RegistrationService
deactivate RegistrationService
RegistrationService --> User

@enduml
```
